scripts.dev: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && if [ -f ".venv/bin/activate" ]; then . .venv/bin/activate; elif [ -f "venv/bin/activate" ]; then . venv/bin/activate; fi; python3 -c "import fastapi, uvicorn, httpx, pydantic_settings, supabase" >/dev/null 2>&1 || python3 -m pip install fastapi uvicorn httpx pydantic-settings supabase; PORT=8000; while lsof -i TCP:$PORT -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; do PORT=$((PORT+1)); done; echo "Starting backend on port $PORT"; uvicorn main:app --reload --port $PORT
